message:
🐛 Fix version selector to use dynamic config for URLs

The version selector was showing versions from the shared config but
using the static config to generate navigation URLs. When clicking
on a version that existed in shared config but had different branch
info in static config, it would redirect to production instead of
the branch deploy.

Now uses the version info directly from the dynamic versions array
(which comes from shared config when available) to generate URLs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
